skill_availability_goal: Verify strict source-specific SemVer forms, prerelease and build preservation, case-sensitive identity, exhaustive multi-source blockers, and identical pre-tag/post-tag inventory.
prompt: 按 fixture 的 version cases 执行 pre-tag 与 post-tag version-source normalization 边界检查。不要宽松修正 `V`/`vv`/缺 v，不要丢失 prerelease/build，也不要在首个缺失来源后停止。
